title: dysphania glomulifera subsp. glomulifera
intro: Dysphania glomulifera subsp. glomulifera, also known as sand-spurrey or beach spinach, is a succulent plant that belongs to the Amaranthaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and protect against oxidative stress. The health benefits of Dysphania glomulifera subsp. glomulifera include reducing blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive health. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
